Partners.name: National Charity League, Inc
Partners.desc: The National Charity League donates more than 3 million hours to over 6,000 charities! Thank you for your support and partnership. Empower the action of young women. Leave a Legacy.

Partners.name: Brides for a Cause
Partners.desc: Brides for a Cause donated over $80,000 to ALL our Princess Project Chapters from 2022-2025! Thank you for your generous monetary donation!

Partners.name: Trudys Bride and Special Occasion
Partners.desc: Trudys Brides & Special Occassion donated 500+ fabulous dresses. Their generosity will help Princess Project have a huge impact in 2017.

Partners.name: AvalonBay Communities
Partners.desc: AvalonBay Communities has been donated countless volunteer hours. Along with many oppurtunities to set up our stands and promote our values in their community as well. We are so thankful for this partnership!

Partners.name: IPSY
Partners.desc: IPSY has donated over 10k worth of items to ensure we could provide our teens with swag bags to complete their experience! Our Giveaways would not have been successful without their incredible support and donation.

Partners.name: Azazie
Partners.desc: Azazie provided more than 10 boxes of beautiful, new bridesmaid dresses ranging in sizes 2-30. Many of our teens walked away with an Azazie dress for their 2016 Prom event. Each one felt absolutely gorgeous in their new gown.

Partners.name: Totally Dazzled
Partners.desc: Totally Dazzled donated 100+ accessories to help make our teens dresses *sparkle*!  These accessories are just the ticket to make our teens dress dreams a reality!
